about.intro.title: We build the software and the demand to grow your business.
about.intro.body1: Vivabyte is a marketing and software studio. We help ambitious businesses grow online by building the software they need — websites, web apps, and automations — and creating the demand that drives them, through SEO, content, and paid campaigns.
about.intro.body2: Most companies juggle a developer, a marketer, and a designer who never talk to each other. Vivabyte is all three, in one place. You work directly with the person building your product and running your growth — no account managers, no handoffs, nothing lost in translation.
values.title: Our values
values.1.title: One team, no handoffs
values.1.desc: Marketing and software live under one roof. Strategy and execution never get lost between vendors, because they're the same people.
values.2.title: Built right, not just built
values.2.desc: Senior craft on every project — modern, fast, accessible work made to last. No juniors learning on your budget.
values.3.title: Move fast, stay modern
values.3.desc: We ship in weeks, not months, using modern stacks and AI to do more with less — and pass that efficiency on to you.
values.4.title: An honest partnership
values.4.desc: You talk directly to the maker. Transparent communication, clear expectations, and you own everything we build — the code and the accounts.
work.soon.title: Our first case studies are on the way.
work.soon.body: Vivabyte is a young studio, and we put the same care into our own portfolio that we put into our clients' work. Want to be one of our first success stories?

testimonial.quote: Vivabyte felt less like an agency and more like our own product and growth team. They shipped fast, and the numbers followed.
testimonial.author: Client Name
faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.q1: How long until we see results?
faq.a1: Software ships in weeks, not months, through fast iterations. For SEO, expect first results in 3–6 months; paid campaigns drive results within weeks.
faq.q2: Do you handle both software and marketing?
faq.a2: Yes — that's the whole point. One team designs, builds, and promotes, so strategy and execution never get lost between vendors.
faq.q3: What size companies do you work with?
faq.a3: From funded startups to established enterprises. We scope every engagement to fit your stage and budget.
faq.a4: No lock-in. We offer fixed-scope projects and renewable monthly retainers — we keep clients through results, not contracts.
faq.q5: Who owns the code and the accounts?
faq.a5: You do. Every product we build and every ad account is yours, fully documented and handed over.
faq.a6: Send us a message or book a call. We reply within 24 hours with clear next steps.

cookie.title: We value your privacy
cookie.body: We use analytics cookies to understand how the site is used and improve it. They stay off until you accept. Data is processed in the EU.
cookie.necessary.title: Strictly necessary
cookie.necessary.desc: Required for the site to work. Always on.
cookie.analytics.title: Analytics & session recording
cookie.analytics.desc: Helps us measure usage and improve the site, including anonymised session recordings (PostHog, EU-hosted).
page.privacy.title: Privacy & Cookie Policy
page.privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data.
meta.privacy.title: Privacy & Cookie Policy — Vivabyte
meta.privacy.description: How Vivabyte collects, uses, and protects your personal data, including analytics, session recording, and cookies. EU-hosted.
privacy.intro: This Privacy & Cookie Policy explains how Vivabyte ("we", "us") collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you visit vivabyte.eu. We are based in the European Union and process all data within the EU.
privacy.controller.title: Who we are
privacy.controller.body:
Vivabyte is the data controller for the personal data described in this policy.
For any privacy question or to exercise your rights, contact us at info@vivabyte.eu.
privacy.data.title: What data we collect
privacy.data.body:
We collect the following:
• Contact details you submit — name, email, optional company, and your message — when you use our contact form.
• Usage and analytics data — pages visited, clicks, referring site, and approximate location derived from your IP address.
• Session recordings — replays of how visitors interact with the site (mouse movement, clicks, scrolling). All text and form inputs are masked and never recorded.
• Technical data — browser type, device, operating system, and IP address.
privacy.analytics.title: Analytics & session recording
privacy.analytics.body:
We use PostHog, a product analytics tool, to understand how the site is used and to improve it. PostHog records page views, interactions, session replays, and approximate location from your IP address.
This only happens after you give consent through the cookie banner. If you decline, no analytics data or recordings are collected.
We configure PostHog to mask all text and form inputs in session recordings, so personal data you type is not captured.
privacy.cookies.title: Cookies & consent
privacy.cookies.body:
We use two categories of storage:
• Strictly necessary — required for the site to function (e.g. security and your language choice). Always active and exempt from consent.
• Analytics — set by PostHog only after you accept. They support analytics and session recording.
No analytics cookies or storage are set before you consent. You can change or withdraw your choice at any time using the button below or the "Cookie settings" link in the footer.
privacy.legal.title: Legal basis for processing
privacy.legal.body:
• Analytics and session recording: your consent (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR and the ePrivacy Directive). You may withdraw it at any time.
• Contact form: to respond to your enquiry and take steps at your request (Article 6(1)(b)), and our legitimate interest in handling enquiries (Article 6(1)(f)).
privacy.storage.title: Where your data is stored
privacy.storage.body: All data is processed and stored within the European Union. Our analytics provider, PostHog, is hosted on its EU cloud (eu.i.posthog.com), so your data does not leave the EU. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.retention.title: How long we keep your data
privacy.retention.body: Analytics data and session recordings are retained for up to 12 months. Contact enquiries are kept only as long as needed to respond and for our legitimate business records, after which they are deleted.
privacy.rights.title: Your rights
privacy.rights.body:
Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, to object to processing, to data portability, and to withdraw consent at any time.
To exercise any of these rights, email us at info@vivabyte.eu. We respond within 30 days.
privacy.complaints.title: Contact & complaints
privacy.complaints.body:
Questions about this policy? Email info@vivabyte.eu.
If you believe we have not handled your data properly, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority (in Portugal, the Comissão Nacional de Proteção de Dados — CNPD).
